creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145898
shar archive with new port

This port is a new prerequisite for next version of existing port 
	textproc/p5-YAML
It does not intersect with existing ports:
	devel/p5-Test-YAML-Meta
	devel/p5-Test-YAML-Valid
	
Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Test-YAML > p5-Test-YAML.log
